title: Wano Prepares While the World Shakes
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Toki, Luffy as The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
scene: The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You guys haven't changed a bit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Don't run in the halls... it's dangerous...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please don't ride a tricycle in the hall way!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right, we can't forget about this man...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He's our homework teacher, Aokiji- Sense!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well... if you're going to play, go do it whole- heartedly.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He may be a lazy teacher sometimes, but you can always count on him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I want you to answer my question.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is new world middle school. Anything can happen here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Don't look down on Middle School...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What creature is on four legs in the morning,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Two legs during the day, and three legs at night!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah. Nami-san... Can you show me your panties?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...you want to see her panties, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Let's get back to the riddle....!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: During the day, (mid-life) we're all adults.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And at night, (being elderly) we use a cane.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Oh, yeah. I haven't seen him yet.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'VE GOT IT!!! THE ANSWER... IS FRANKY!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: luffy- San... the answer was already given...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shaha Hahahaha!! School is a place where you come to swim.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: New World Middle School is home to many terrible characters!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Before the Raid and World News storyline with 55 dialogue beats. The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
